failures.description: The agent misread or ignored the ProductCatalogSearch result and answered that there were no matching items, even though the tool returned one valid match priced above $45.76.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to answer which available beginner Jigsaw Puzzle costs more than $45.76. The tool call was correct and returned one matching item: item_id 1096508426 priced at $46.13. At index 4, the Executor synthesized an answer that directly contradicts this tool output by saying no items match. This is grounded in relevant prior tool output and is not a malformed invocation, missing information, or unsupported intent.
